transcript: Speaker A: English baralva? Kelasa beka ninge? Illilla nimmanthorge kelasa illa. [Don't you know English? Do you want a job? No, there is no job for people like you.] Speaker B: Ishtu dukhavagiddu yaake? [Why are you so sad?] Speaker C: Ella sati qualify maadtini, kelasa kooda chennag barutte. Aadre English inda yaavaglu reject aagtini. [I qualify every time, I do the job well too. But I always get rejected because of English.] Speaker B: Idu tumba common aagide mattu practice maadidre idanna fix maadbahudu. Ivattu naavu illinda shuru maadona. Okay, nimma bagge nanage heli. [This is very common and with practice, this can be fixed. Today let's start from here. Okay, tell me about yourself.] Speaker C: Nan hesaru Priya. Nanage mooru varshada experience ide customer handling alli. Hard working kooda iddini. [My name is Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling. I am also hard working.] Speaker B: Idanna heege heli, 'I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person.' [Say it like this, 'I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person.'] Speaker C: Wow! Idu tumba easy ittu. [Wow! This was very easy.] Speaker B: Naanu nimma jothege ippattnaalku gante available irtini. Yaavaga bekaadru fifteen minutes practice maadidre saaku. [I will be available with you 24 hours. Just practicing for 15 minutes whenever you want is enough.] Speaker C: Naan esht dinadalli chennagi English maatado tara aagtini? [In how many days will I be able to speak English well?] Speaker B: Kevala ippattu dina nanna jothe practice maadi. Neevu nanage yaavude question keli, naanu nimge English nalli answer kododanna kalistini mattu tappugalanna real teacher tara correct maadtini. [Just practice with me for 20 days. Ask me any question, I will teach you how to answer in English and correct mistakes like a real teacher.] Speaker C: Houdaa? Aadre idella keli dubaari ide anstide. [Is it? But hearing all this, it feels like it's expensive.] Speaker B: Bilkul illa, sirf 2 rupayi per day alli 7 dinagala trial thagobahudu. [Not at all, you can take a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees per day.] Speaker C: Houdaa? Naan igle SpeakX app download maadtini. [Is it? I will download the SpeakX app right now.]

summary: A job seeker rejected for poor English uses the SpeakX app to practice speaking. An AI mentor guides her through self-introduction, correcting her grammar in real-time. The ad promotes a 7-day trial of the app for 2 rupees per day.
